license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfexjjfn
title: Preparation of 0.2M EDTA, pH 8.0
author: Nicola O'Reilly

steps_raw.instruction: Please select between the recipes for 1 L 0.2 M EDTA pH 8.0 and 2 L 0.2 M EDTA pH 8.0 . Work in fume hood!
Weigh out 74.45 g, EDTA disodium salt , dihydrate and add to a 1 L beaker.
Measure out 800 mL, MilliQ water and add to the beaker.
Add a magnetic flea and place on a magnetic stirring plate to mix the solution. The EDTA salt will not go into solution until the pH reaches pH 8.0 .
Add a newly calibrated pH meter into the solution to observe the pH.

To dissolve the salt, add sodium hydroxide (NaOH) pellets to the solution. Add a few pellets at a time and wait until the pellets have fully dissolved before adding more. It may take around 8 g, NaOH pellets before the pH is at pH 8.0 .
Fine tune pH with 5 Molarity (M), NaOH .
Once fully dissolved (this will take some time so be patient), transfer to 1 L beaker and top up the solution to 1 L using MilliQ water , if necessary.
Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.
Label with batch and date.
Store 0.2 Molarity (M), EDTA pH 8.0 solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).
Weigh out 148.89 g, EDTA disodium salt , dihydrate and add to a 2 L beaker.
Measure out 1600 mL, MilliQ water and add to the beaker.
Add a magnetic flea and place on a magnetic stirring plate to mix the solution. The EDTA salt will not go into solution until the pH reaches pH 8.0 .
Add a newly calibrated pH meter into the solution to observe the pH.

To dissolve the salt, add sodium hydroxide (NaOH) pellets to the solution. Add a few pellets at a time and wait until the pellets have fully dissolved before adding more. It may take around 16 g, NaOH pellets before the pH is at pH 8.0 .
Fine tune pH with 5 Molarity (M), NaOH .
Once fully dissolved (this will take some time so be patient), transfer to 2 L beaker and top up the solution to 2 L using MilliQ water , if necessary.
Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.
Label with batch and date.
Store 0.2 Molarity (M), EDTA pH 8.0 solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).
